heading: Repealed. , ,Pub. L. 95–584, § 192 Stat. 2483Nov. 2, 1978
label: 1480 to 1480b Repealed. , ,Pub. L. 95–584, § 192 Stat. 2483Nov. 2, 1978
notes: Section 1480, R.S. § 1890, related to right of religious corporations to hold real estate.
Section 1480a, , , related to real estate necessary for use of congregations.act Mar. 3, 1887, ch. 397, § 2624 Stat. 641
Section 1480b, , , related to inapplicability of sections 1480 and 1480a to Alaska.act Sept. 22, 1950, ch. 98664 Stat. 905

Effect of Repeal, , , provided that:Pub. L. 95–584, § 292 Stat. 2483Nov. 2, 1978“This repeal [repealing sections 1480 to 1480b of this title] may not be considered or construed as endorsement, support, or permission for any development on or other use of any land in any territory or possession of the United States; nor shall it be evidence of congressional or other intent to confirm title to any lands in said territories or possessions claimed by any association, corporation, or other entity for religious or charitable purposes.”
